Example Mobility reports synthetic annual results

March 18, 2026

Annual summary

Example Mobility reported synthetic annual revenue of 12.4 billion units, up 18.2% year over year.

Product revenue was 10.1 billion units, while service revenue was 2.3 billion units.

The company delivered 84,000 devices during the year.

Management statement

The chief executive said that product reliability and service capacity remained the main operating priorities.

The company expects next-quarter deliveries between 21,000 and 23,000 devices.

Important notice

This document is fully synthetic and must not be treated as a real company filing or market claim.
